offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rental applications/month, inconsistent document formats cause delays in processing applications. We convert real estate documents into standardized listings and rental applications instead of manual document formatting and entry.
problem: Inconsistent document formats lead to delays in processing applications.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template creation for 1-3 listings
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import feature for existing data
